detectors.description:
SimpleBet.bet() (SimpleBet.sol#15-29) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- ! msg.sender.call.value(2000000000000000000)() (SimpleBet.sol#23)
detectors.markdown:
[SimpleBet.bet()](SimpleBet.sol#L15-L29) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- [! msg.sender.call.value(2000000000000000000)()](SimpleBet.sol#L23)

detectors.description: SimpleBet.bet() (SimpleBet.sol#15-29) uses a weak PRNG: "(random() % 2 == 1) && (msg.value == 1000000000000000000) && (! locked) (SimpleBet.sol#19)"

SimpleBet.bet() (SimpleBet.sol#15-29) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- (random() % 2 == 1) && (msg.value == 1000000000000000000) && (! locked) (SimpleBet.sol#19)
detectors.markdown:
[SimpleBet.bet()](SimpleBet.sol#L15-L29) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- [(random() % 2 == 1) && (msg.value == 1000000000000000000) && (! locked)](SimpleBet.sol#L19)

detectors.description:
SimpleBet.own(address).owner (SimpleBet.sol#65) lacks a zero-check on :
		- gameOwner = owner (SimpleBet.sol#73)

SimpleBet.bet() (SimpleBet.sol#15-29) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- (random() % 2 == 1) && (msg.value == 1000000000000000000) && (! locked) (SimpleBet.sol#19)
detectors.markdown:
[SimpleBet.bet()](SimpleBet.sol#L15-L29) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- [(random() % 2 == 1) && (msg.value == 1000000000000000000) && (! locked)](SimpleBet.sol#L19)

	- Usage of "throw" should be replaced with "revert()"

detectors.description: solc-0.4.26 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.24 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.24 (SimpleBet.sol#1)
